---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for the project.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or capability you would like added.

## Proposed Solution

Outline the approach, affected files, or technical details.

## Alternatives

Mention other ideas you considered and why they were rejected.

## Additional Context

Links, references, mock-ups, or sample code that clarifies the request.
